tasks.subject: Task 1: Add script table migration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the `script` table with the partial index defined in the spec.

**Files:**
- Create: `db/migrations/004_script.sql`

**Verify:** Boot the server, confirm `migrations completed` log line, then `\d script` in psql.

```json:metadata
{"files":["db/migrations/004_script.sql"],"verifyCommand":"docker compose up -d && go run ./cmd/picotera/main.go --help","acceptanceCriteria":["Migration creates script table","Partial index on (enabled) WHERE enabled=TRUE","Up + Down sections present","Runs cleanly on dev DB"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add sqlc queries for script
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Define CRUD + ListEnabledScripts queries and regenerate Go code.

**Files:**
- Create: `db/queries/script.sql`
- Regenerate: `pkg/db/script.sql.go`, `pkg/db/models.go`, `pkg/db/querier.go`

**Verify:** `sqlc generate && go build ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files":["db/queries/script.sql","pkg/db/script.sql.go","pkg/db/models.go","pkg/db/querier.go"],"verifyCommand":"sqlc generate && go build ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["ListScripts ordered by created_at DESC","ListEnabledScripts ordered by id ASC","GetScript by id","InsertScript returns *","UpdateScript with updated_at=now()","DeleteScript","sqlc generate succeeds","go build ./... succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add JS-engine config fields
tasks.description:

**Verify:** `go build ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/configx/configx.go"],"verifyCommand":"go build ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["Four new fields with mapstructure tags","Defaults: 5s, 64MiB, 50, 60s","Env vars auto-bound by bindEnvs"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Add modernc.org/quickjs dependency
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `modernc.org/quickjs` to go.mod and verify it imports.

**Files:**

**Verify:** Trivial smoke test runs.

```json:metadata
{"files":["go.mod","go.sum"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/jsx/ -run TestQuickJSSmoke -v","acceptanceCriteria":["go get modernc.org/quickjs succeeds","NewVM/Eval/Close smoke runs","Module in require block"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: jsx package skeleton — Engine, Session, embedded SDK
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Foundation for `pkg/jsx`: Engine, per-request Session that creates a VM, evaluates embedded SDK, and loads enabled user scripts.

**Files:**
- Create: `pkg/jsx/engine.go`, `pkg/jsx/session.go`, `pkg/jsx/store.go`, `pkg/jsx/sdk.go`, `pkg/jsx/sdk.js`, `pkg/jsx/engine_test.go`

**Verify:** `go test ./pkg/jsx/ -run TestEngine_LoadsScripts -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/jsx/engine.go","pkg/jsx/session.go","pkg/jsx/store.go","pkg/jsx/sdk.go","pkg/jsx/sdk.js","pkg/jsx/engine_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/jsx/ -run TestEngine_LoadsScripts -v","acceptanceCriteria":["NewSession constructs VM with limits","Close idempotent","sdk.js sets globalThis.picotera.hooks.<name>","Waterfall.tap and runWaterfall implemented","Two-tap test asserts both registered"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Promise pump — awaitJSExpr
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Drive QuickJS until a Promise settles or timeout fires.

**Files:**
- Create: `pkg/jsx/promise.go`
- Modify: `pkg/jsx/sdk.js`, `pkg/jsx/session.go`, `pkg/jsx/engine_test.go`

**Verify:** `go test ./pkg/jsx/ -run TestSession_Promise -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/jsx/promise.go","pkg/jsx/sdk.js","pkg/jsx/session.go","pkg/jsx/engine_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/jsx/ -run TestSession_Promise -v","acceptanceCriteria":["Resolves Promise.resolve(42)","Propagates rejection with message","Returns ErrHookTimeout on wall-clock expiry"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: ctx marshaling — Go ↔ JS types via JSON
tasks.description:
**Goal:** JSON-based round-trip marshaling between Go and JS for hook ctx.

**Files:**
- Create: `pkg/jsx/types.go`
- Modify: `pkg/jsx/sdk.js`, `pkg/jsx/session.go`, `pkg/jsx/engine_test.go`

**Verify:** `go test ./pkg/jsx/ -run TestSession_CtxRoundTrip -v && go test ./pkg/jsx/ -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/jsx/types.go","pkg/jsx/sdk.js","pkg/jsx/session.go","pkg/jsx/engine_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/jsx/ -v","acceptanceCriteria":["marshalToJSLiteral encodes Go to JSON","JS resolves with JSON.stringify","unmarshalJSON decodes back to Go","Reverse-array roundtrip test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Hook entrypoints — Sort/BeforeRequest/Rewrite
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Three Go-callable hook methods on Session.

**Files:**
- Modify: `pkg/jsx/session.go`, `pkg/jsx/types.go`, `pkg/jsx/engine_test.go`

**Verify:** `go test ./pkg/jsx/ -run TestSession_Hooks -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/jsx/session.go","pkg/jsx/types.go","pkg/jsx/engine_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/jsx/ -run TestSession_Hooks -v","acceptanceCriteria":["RunSortHook handles undefined/array/ctx return","RunBeforeRequestHook defaults to {next:false,delay:0}","RunBeforeRequestHook reads {next,delay}","RunRewriteHook stringifies object body","All three honor HookTimeout"]}
```

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/jsx/helpers.go","pkg/jsx/sdk.js","pkg/jsx/session.go","pkg/jsx/engine.go","pkg/jsx/engine_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/jsx/ -v","acceptanceCriteria":["NewSession takes requestID","picotera.fetch returns Promise of {status,headers,body}","setTimeout/clearTimeout via Go timers","console.* writes via logx with script_id and request_id"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 14: Gateway integration — call hooks in retry loop
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace for-range loop with index-based retry loop; call sortProviders once, beforeRequest each iter, rewriteRequest before forward.

**Files:**
- Modify: `pkg/server/handle_gateway.go`, `pkg/server/gateway_helpers.go`

**Verify:** `go build ./...` + manual smoke (sort reverse, skip-all, rewrite header).

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/server/handle_gateway.go","pkg/server/gateway_helpers.go"],"verifyCommand":"go build ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["Session created after resolveProviders, defer Close","Session init fails → 502","RunSortHook once before loop","Index-based loop with currentRetryCount/totalAttemptCount/lastError","beforeRequest honored: next/delay clamped to MaxDelay","rewriteRequest applies url/method/headers/body overrides","Body changed → ContentLength updated","timeout → 503; other hook err → 502","MaxTotalAttempts cap → 502"]}
```
